description: ATAM session focused on an AI/LLM platform.
systemContext: LLM-serving platform with a gateway, model runners, a vector store, and a control plane.
businessDrivers: Predictable response latency under bursty load.
Cost per 1k tokens stays below target.
constraints: Limited GPU fleet; no autoscale outside business hours.
All prompts must be retained for 30 days for audit.

approaches.name: Tiered routing
approaches.description: Small/fast model for simple prompts, large model for complex ones.
